settings.heading: A modern custom product store built around creativity and low-waste production.
settings.text: We create and curate designs for products that are printed only when customers order, making it easier to offer fresh ideas without overproducing stock.

settings.title: Design-led catalog
settings.text: Products are selected around design potential, everyday usefulness, and clear personalization value.

settings.title: Made after purchase
settings.text: Printing after checkout helps reduce waste and lets the catalog evolve quickly with customer demand.

settings.title: Quality learning loop
settings.text: Samples, customer feedback, and supplier performance should guide which products stay and scale.
